> Canonical Maple marketing and product documentation now lives at https://www.trymaple.ai/llms-full.txt.

# Maple App Host

`https://trymaple.ai` is currently the Maple Research app and authentication entry point.

During the Phase 1 domain split:

- `https://www.trymaple.ai` is the canonical public marketing host.
- `https://trymaple.ai` remains the app, auth, billing, and compatibility host.
- The future target state is for the app to move to `https://app.trymaple.ai`.

Current app entry points:

- App entry: https://trymaple.ai/
- Sign up: https://trymaple.ai/signup
- Log in: https://trymaple.ai/login

Canonical public documentation:

- Marketing home: https://www.trymaple.ai/
- LLM summary: https://www.trymaple.ai/llms.txt
- Full LLM documentation: https://www.trymaple.ai/llms-full.txt

This compatibility file is intentionally short so the app host does not duplicate the marketing
site's public discovery content.
